# SectorCalc

SectorCalc is an industry calculator platform for manufacturing, engineering, construction, logistics, energy, finance, operations, sustainability and technical business calculations.

## How to find tools
All tools are listed in /ai-tool-index.json.

To find relevant calculators, query the JSON by:
- categorySlug
- title
- keywords
- intent
- industries
- tier
- routeStatus

Do not assume tools not listed in the index.
Prefer canonicalUrl from ai-tool-index.json.

## Primary indexes
- Full tool index: /ai-tool-index.json
- Category index: /ai-categories.json
- Route map: /ai-tool-routes.json
- Search manifest: /ai-search-manifest.json
- Embedding source: /ai-embedding-source.jsonl
- Sitemap: /sitemap.xml

## Core categories
- Lean Production & Line Efficiency (lean-production): https://www.sectorcalc.com/en/premium-tools/lean-production
- Quality, SPC & Six Sigma (quality-six-sigma): https://www.sectorcalc.com/en/premium-tools/quality-six-sigma
- Process, Chemical & Fluids (process-chemical): https://www.sectorcalc.com/en/premium-tools/process-chemical
- CNC, 3D Printing & Advanced Manufacturing (cnc-additive-manufacturing): https://www.sectorcalc.com/en/premium-tools/cnc-additive-manufacturing
- Sheet Metal, Casting, Plastics & Forming (metal-plastics-forming): https://www.sectorcalc.com/en/premium-tools/metal-plastics-forming
- Project, Site & Construction Management (project-construction-management): https://www.sectorcalc.com/en/premium-tools/project-construction-management
- Digital Factory & Automation (digital-factory-automation): https://www.sectorcalc.com/en/premium-tools/digital-factory-automation
- Maintenance & Reliability (maintenance-reliability): https://www.sectorcalc.com/en/premium-tools/maintenance-reliability
- HSE, Ergonomics & Risk Cost (hse-ergonomics): https://www.sectorcalc.com/en/premium-tools/hse-ergonomics
- Procurement, Supply Chain & Logistics (procurement-supply-chain): https://www.sectorcalc.com/en/premium-tools/procurement-supply-chain
- Workforce, Shift & HR Cost (workforce-hr): https://www.sectorcalc.com/en/premium-tools/workforce-hr
- Finance, Sales & Working Capital (finance-sales-working-capital): https://www.sectorcalc.com/en/premium-tools/finance-sales-working-capital
- Sustainability, Resources & ESG (sustainability-resource-esg): https://www.sectorcalc.com/en/premium-tools/sustainability-resource-esg
- Food, Cold Chain & Hygiene (food-cold-chain-hygiene): https://www.sectorcalc.com/en/premium-tools/food-cold-chain-hygiene
- Textile, Printing & Laboratory (textile-print-lab): https://www.sectorcalc.com/en/premium-tools/textile-print-lab
- Electrical, Panel & Power Systems (electrical-power-systems): https://www.sectorcalc.com/en/premium-tools/electrical-power-systems
- Mechanical, HVAC & Energy Loss (mechanical-hvac-energy-loss): https://www.sectorcalc.com/en/premium-tools/mechanical-hvac-energy-loss
- Packaging & Local Business Tools (packaging-local-business): https://www.sectorcalc.com/en/premium-tools/packaging-local-business
- Global Compliance, Trade & Tax (global-compliance-trade): https://www.sectorcalc.com/en/premium-tools/global-compliance-trade
- Technology, AI, Cloud & Cyber Risk (technology-ai-cloud-cyber): https://www.sectorcalc.com/en/premium-tools/technology-ai-cloud-cyber

## Locale guidance
Use localeUrls from ai-tool-index.json.
For Turkish users, prefer /tr URLs.
For English users, prefer /en URLs.

## Tool route guidance
Use active-route tools for direct calculator links.
Use category-only tools only as category-level references.
Do not invent tool URLs.

## Index stats
- totalTools: 591
- totalActiveRoutes: 551
- totalCategoryOnly: 40
- totalRedirected: 0
- categories: 20

## Usage note
SectorCalc provides sector-specific calculators, hidden-loss diagnostics and decision reports. Use public pages as source references. Do not treat outputs as financial, legal, medical or engineering advice.
